name: MY HERO ONE'S JUSTICE 2
short_description: MY HERO ONE'S JUSTICE 2, the over-the-top follow-up to the smash hit 3D arena fighter MY HERO ONE'S JUSTICE, makes its heroic debut! Make full use of characters' Quirks as you clash head-to-head in epic battles across huge arenas!
detailed_description:
Ultimate Edition



The Ultimate Edition includes:
• MY HERO ONE'S JUSTICE 2
• Season Pass
• Season Pass 2
• In-game item: Ribbit Ribbit Set


Digital Deluxe Edition



The Deluxe Edition includes:
• MY HERO ONE'S JUSTICE 2
• Season Pass

Deluxe Edition Bonus:
• In-game item: Ribbit Ribbit Set

Bonus for purchasing the previous game, MY HERO ONE'S JUSTICE:
- Special customization item set for Izuku Midoriya

MY HERO ONE'S JUSTICE 2, the over-the-top follow-up to the smash hit 3D arena fighter MY HERO ONE'S JUSTICE, makes its heroic debut! Make full use of characters' Quirks as you clash head-to-head in epic battles across huge arenas!

*In addition to this product, the Standard Edition and Ultimate Edition are also available. Please be careful not to purchase the same content twice.
*Season Pass character DLCs are available for purchase separately.
*To receive the bonus for purchasing the previous game, you must have save data from MY HERO ONE'S JUSTICE.


About the Game



Bonus for purchasing the previous game, MY HERO ONE'S JUSTICE:
- Special customization item set for Izuku Midoriya

MY HERO ONE'S JUSTICE 2, the over-the-top follow-up to the smash hit 3D arena fighter MY HERO ONE'S JUSTICE, makes its heroic debut! Make full use of characters' Quirks as you clash head-to-head in epic battles across huge arenas!

*In addition to this product, the Deluxe Edition and Ultimate Edition are also available. Please be careful not to purchase the same content twice.
*To receive the bonus for purchasing the previous game, you must have save data from MY HERO ONE'S JUSTICE.
